title: Omnisend vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Omnisend and Flodesk. We break down pricing, features, and who each email marketing tool is best for.
intro: Omnisend and Flodesk are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Omnisend is built for e-commerce brands wanting integrated email and SMS, while Flodesk emphasizes design and appeals to creative professionals. Here's how they compare.
choose_a_if: You're running an e-commerce business and need SMS and push notifications alongside email
You want to start free and only pay when you're ready to scale
You need advanced segmentation and pre-built automation workflows for product promotions
choose_b_if: You prioritize beautiful email design and want professionally crafted templates
You're willing to pay for unlimited subscribers from day one
You're a creative professional (designer, photographer, creator) who values aesthetics over channels

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Omnisend is better for e-commerce businesses that need SMS, push notifications, and advanced automation. Flodesk is better for visual-first brands and creators who prioritize email design and want unlimited subscribers from the start.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Omnisend or Flodesk?
faq.a: Omnisend is cheaper overall if you're starting out—it offers a free tier up to 250 subscribers and plans starting at $16/month. Flodesk has no free tier and starts at $38/month, but includes unlimited subscribers immediately.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Omnisend?
faq.a: Yes, most email platforms allow you to export your subscriber list and migrate to another service. However, you'll need to rebuild your automation workflows and email templates in Omnisend, as these don't typically transfer between platforms.
